calendar.matters:
Petition For Appointment Of Successor Co-Trustees And For Authority To Sell Trust Real Property
Off Calendar Jan-07-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Ernest Der for Katrina James-Barone.

The Court noted that it has consents from all of the Beneficiaries. Mr. Der stated that there is still no complete copy of the Trust document, that he filed a declaration regarding his efforts to locate it, that Ms. James has passed away, that he was able to get his Client appointed as temporary Trustee and that they sold the house. The Court granted the Petition for Appointment of Successor Co-Trustees and for Authority to Sell Trust Real Property (subject to receiving a revised order that limits relief to what is a live issue at this point).

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy R. McConico. (Not Reported)

Petition For Appointment Of Successor Co-Trustees And For Authority To Sell Trust Real Property
Off Calendar Dec-08-2014 Continued To Dec-22-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
Ex Parte Petition For Appointment Of Temporary Successor Co-Trustees And For Authority To Sell Trust Real Property
